problem_statement: Filtering by more than one tag has stopped narrowing results. When I run list with `--tag home --tag urgent` I expect only the tasks carrying BOTH tags, but I now get every task that has either one of them — adding more `--tag` flags actually makes the list grow instead of shrink. Filtering by a single tag still behaves correctly, which is probably why nobody noticed for a while. The CLI help for the flag explicitly says 'all given tags must match', and that intersection behaviour is what our saved workflows rely on; combined tag filters should require every requested tag on a task.
notes: filter_tags rewritten from all() (AND) to a first-match loop (OR semantics).
